pom.xml.general_idea: Update the project's target Java version property from 17 to 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile and run against Java 17 semantics, failing to utilize or enforce Java 21 features and compatibility.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the JaCoCo Maven plugin version to a snapshot compatible with newer toolchains.
Upgrade the Maven Checkstyle plugin version to a snapshot compatible with newer toolchains.
Upgrade the Maven Compiler plugin version to a snapshot compatible with newer toolchains.
Upgrade the Maven WAR plugin version to a snapshot compatible with newer toolchains.
Explicitly set the scope of jakarta.annotation-api to provided to avoid packaging conflicts in the final artifact.
Replace deprecated source/target compiler configuration with the unified release flag for Java 9+ compatibility.
pom.xml.why_exists: Using source/target with Java 21 may trigger deprecation warnings or fail if strict release compliance is enforced; release is the standard for modern Java compilation.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add release flag to the test compiler configuration to ensure tests are compiled against the target Java version.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this, tests might be compiled with default or inherited settings that do not match the main source release level, potentially causing runtime incompatibilities or missing feature support in tests.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Migrate legacy string concatenation for multi-line log messages to Java 21 text blocks.
Replace String.format with the Java 15+ String.formatted method for string interpolation.
Add the @Serial annotation to the serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 21 serialization best practices.
Import the java.io.Serial annotation class required for the new annotation usage.
Add import for java.io.Serial annotation to support Java 21 serialization best practices.
Annotate serialVersionUID with @Serial to explicitly mark it as a serialization field.
Add @Serial annotation to serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 17+ serialization best practices.
Refactor instanceof check and cast for MethodArgumentNotValidException to use pattern matching.
Refactor instanceof check and cast for BadRequestAlertException to use pattern matching.
Add the @Serial annotation to the serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 14+ serialization best practices and suppress warnings.

src/test/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace deprecated String.format static import with the modern String.formatted() instance method introduced in Java 15.
src/test/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.after: return "SELECT %s FROM jhi_date_time_wrapper where id=%d".formatted(fieldName, id);

src/test/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Add the @Serial annotation to the serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 21 serialization best practices.
Replace manual index-based retrieval of the last list element with the Java 21 List.getLast() convenience method.
Refactor instanceof checks to use pattern matching for cleaner code.
src/test/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.after: if (item instanceof BigDecimal decimal) { return decimal; }
